summary: Iteration 41: Photo template header layout improvement (Req #26) - VERIFIED WORKING. Professional templates (professional, professional-blue, professional-minimal) correctly display side-by-side header layout with photo on LEFT and name/contact info on RIGHT. Contact info includes icons (email, phone, LinkedIn, location). Template switching works correctly between all 11 templates.
passed_tests: Professional template displays header with side-by-side layout - VERIFIED
Corporate Blue template displays header with side-by-side layout - VERIFIED
Clean Minimal template displays header with side-by-side layout - VERIFIED
Photo appears on the LEFT side of the header (85px circular) - VERIFIED
Name appears on the RIGHT side beside the photo - VERIFIED
Contact info with icons (email ✉, phone 📞, LinkedIn 🔗, location 📍) on RIGHT - VERIFIED
Header is compact and doesn't waste vertical space - VERIFIED
Profile Photo upload section appears when Professional template selected - VERIFIED
Photo upload works correctly (resizes to max 300px) - VERIFIED
ResumePreview component renders professional templates correctly - VERIFIED
Template switching between all 11 templates works correctly - VERIFIED
Download PDF button is visible and enabled - VERIFIED
PDF generation code uses same side-by-side layout structure - CODE REVIEW VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: ResumePreview.jsx (lines 250-346): Header with photo uses display:flex, gap:20px, alignItems:flex-start for side-by-side layout
ProfessionalTemplate.jsx (lines 313-396): Header section uses flex layout with photo on left, name/contact on right
ResumeOptimizerPage.jsx (lines 718-910): PDF generation for professional templates uses same side-by-side structure
Contact info parsing correctly extracts email, phone, LinkedIn, and location with regex patterns
Photo upload handler (lines 438-488) resizes images to max 300px and converts to JPEG
seed_data_creation: Test resume PDF created at /tmp/test_resume.pdf, test photo created at /tmp/test_photo.jpg
